MYSTS2MOD-FORGE_GUARD_POWER.title: Forge Guard
MYSTS2MOD-FORGE_GUARD_POWER.description: Whenever you [gold]Forge[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times the forge amount as [gold]Block[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-FORGE_GUARD_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever you [gold]Forge[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times the forge amount as [gold]Block[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-ENERGY_DOWN_NEXT_TURN_POWER.de: At the start of your next turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-ENERGY_DOWN_NEXT_TURN_POWER.sm: At the start of your next turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-ASTRAL_DIRECT_LINK_POWER.title: Astral Direct Link
MYSTS2MOD-ASTRAL_DIRECT_LINK_POWER.descr: Whenever you play a 0-cost card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. Every 3rd 0-cost card played in a single turn gives [blue]1[/blue] extra [gold]Energy[/gold]. Cards left to play: [blue]{CardsLeft}[/blue].
MYSTS2MOD-ASTRAL_DIRECT_LINK_POWER.smart: Whenever you play a 0-cost card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. Every 3rd 0-cost card played in a single turn gives [blue]1[/blue] extra [gold]Energy[/gold]. Cards left to play: [blue]{CardsLeft}[/blue].
